texto: Of course, even though Peter and I have had our disagreements, we share a bond I'd defend to the death if needs be. If all goes according to the natural order of things, siblings will know us longer than our parents, longer than our spouses and friends." Lord Westdale to Duncan
explicacao: Citação de Kieran Kramer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Of course, even though Peter and I have had our disagreements, we share a bond I'd defend to the …” articula reflexao, historical-romance, longer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
